seo.title: Laser Light Shows — BEATROX
seo.description: Beatrox designs and operates professional laser light shows for concerts, festivals, and experiential events — custom beam choreography, sky scanning, and laser mapping.

og.title: Laser Light Shows — BEATROX
og.description: Professional laser systems choreographed to your music and brand — sky scanning, beam effects, and laser mapping for concerts and festivals.

hero.headline: Laser Light Shows
hero.subheadline: High-powered laser systems choreographed to your music and brand — cutting through the dark with precision and impact.

body.content: Few effects command an audience's attention like a precisely choreographed laser show. Beatrox designs and operates professional laser systems for concerts, festivals, brand activations, and large-scale experiential events — from tight venue beam effects to massive outdoor sky scans.

body.heading: Custom Laser Production
body.content: Our laser shows are fully custom-programmed to your event's music, timing, and creative vision. We handle all pre-visualization and programming in advance, with live operation on event day. Beatrox is experienced in integrating laser with LED video walls, projection mapping, and drone light shows for unified multi-system spectacles.

body.heading: System Options
items: Sky scan, fan beam, aerial, and surface mapping modes
